hero.title.line1: You have a project or an idea —
hero.title.line2: I turn it into a concrete, high-performance solution.
hero.description: Freelance full-stack developer — web apps, APIs, automation. From idea to deployment.
hero.problem1: An idea to turn into a working application
hero.problem2: A site to optimize or rebuild
hero.problem3: A process to automate or data to leverage
home.services.title: What I do
home.services.subtitle: Technical solutions tailored to every need, from design to deployment.
home.cta.title: Have a project in mind?
home.contact.title: Let's get in touch
home.contact.description: Reach out by email, WhatsApp or via the form — I'd be happy to discuss your project.
home.cta.description: Let's discuss your project and find the best technical solution together.
services.title: My services
services.question: Can he actually solve MY problem?
services.subtitle: Here's exactly what I can do for you — with concrete proof.
services.webdev.title: Custom web application development
services.webdev.hook: From idea to launch — delivered clearly and on schedule.
services.webdev.problem: Your idea is stuck because no developer truly understands your vision?
services.webdev.solution: I build applications designed around your business: clean UI, maintainable code, iterative delivery. From wireframe to launch, you follow every step.
services.webdev.impact: A working, usable, and scalable application — delivered on schedule.
services.webdev.description: I design applications tailored to your business, performant and scalable.
services.backend.title: Reliable backend & API design
services.backend.hook: A solid architecture that holds in production and scales without friction.
services.backend.problem: Your API crashes, lags, or is impossible to maintain?
services.backend.solution: I design a solid backend architecture: clear endpoints, built-in security, documentation included. Your team (or the next one) can take over without friction.
services.backend.impact: A stable, secure, documented API — zero downtime in production.
services.backend.description: I build a solid, clear and scalable technical foundation.
services.performance.title: Web performance improvement
services.performance.hook: A fast, well-ranked site that keeps your visitors engaged.
services.performance.problem: Your site is slow and you're losing visitors before they even read your offer?
services.performance.solution: I audit, diagnose and optimize: images, JS bundle, cache, Core Web Vitals. Every speed point gained translates into better SEO and more conversions.
services.performance.impact: Lighthouse score +90 on mobile — proven on the Sakalava Lodge project.
services.performance.description: I optimize its speed, fluidity and efficiency.
services.algo.title: Automation & business logic
services.algo.hook: Your processes run on their own — you focus on what matters.
services.algo.problem: You lose hours every week on repetitive tasks that could be automated?
services.algo.solution: I analyze your processes, identify bottlenecks, and code the logic that runs without you. Scripts, data pipelines, API integrations — everything that frees up your time.
services.algo.impact: Up to -80% time spent on recurring manual tasks.
services.algo.description: I structure your data and automate your processes.
home.method.title: My method
home.method.subtitle: A structured process from need to delivery

portfolio.sakalava.solution: Complete performance and technical SEO optimization

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.name: Name
pipeline.analyse.label: Analysis
pipeline.analyse.title: Needs Analysis
pipeline.analyse.description: We start by understanding your business context, goals and constraints. No line of code before we've pinpointed exactly what you need.
pipeline.analyse.benefit: You avoid paying for a solution that doesn't fit you.
pipeline.cadrage.label: Scoping
pipeline.cadrage.title: Scoping & Architecture
pipeline.cadrage.description: I design the technical architecture, functional wireframes and delivery plan. Every technical choice is justified by a concrete business impact.
pipeline.cadrage.benefit: You know exactly what will be delivered, when, and why.
pipeline.code.label: Code
pipeline.code.title: Development
pipeline.code.description: Development follows best practices: clean, modular and maintainable code. Intermediate deliverables let you track progress in real time.
pipeline.code.benefit: Your investment produces code any developer can pick up.
pipeline.test.label: Test
pipeline.test.title: Tests & Validation
pipeline.test.description: Functional, performance and security tests before every delivery. Client acceptance is built into the process to validate each feature meets the need.
pipeline.test.benefit: No bad surprises in production. You validate before paying.
pipeline.deploy.label: Deploy
pipeline.deploy.title: Deployment
pipeline.deploy.description: Careful production deployment with deployment documentation, environment configuration and post-launch performance checks.
pipeline.deploy.benefit: Your product is live, stable and documented.
pipeline.suivi.label: Support
pipeline.suivi.title: Support & Evolution
pipeline.suivi.description: After launch, I remain available for maintenance, fixes and new features. Your product evolves with your business.
pipeline.suivi.benefit: You have a long-term technical partner, not just a contractor.
